scripts.check: pnpm openapi:lint && pnpm openapi:check:ts && pnpm typecheck:tokens && pnpm typecheck:mobile && pnpm test:mobile && pnpm test:api
scripts.openapi:check:ts: pnpm openapi:generate:ts && git ls-files --error-unmatch apps/mobile/src/lib/api/generated/schema.ts && git diff --exit-code -- apps/mobile/src/lib/api/generated/schema.ts
